chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ آذَى الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَ احْتَقَرَهُمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 145 – The one who hurts the Muslims and despises them

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/397)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/397)
text: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) لَقَدْ أَسْرَى رَبِّي بِي فَأَوْحَى إِلَيَّ مِنْ وَرَاءِ الْحِجَابِ مَا أَوْحَى وَ شَافَهَنِي إِلَى أَنْ قَالَ لِي يَا مُحَمَّدُ مَنْ أَذَلَّ لِي وَلِيّاً فَقَدْ أَرْصَدَنِي بِالْمُحَارَبَةِ وَ مَنْ حَارَبَنِي حَارَبْتُهُ
قُلْتُ يَا رَبِّ وَ مَنْ وَلِيُّكَ هَذَا فَقَدْ عَلِمْتُ أَنَّ مَنْ حَارَبَكَ حَارَبْتَهُ قَالَ لِي ذَاكَ مَنْ أَخَذْتُ مِيثَاقَهُ لَكَ وَ لِوَصِيِّكَ وَ لِذُرِّيَّتِكُمَا بِالْوَلَايَةِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from Yunus, from Muawiya,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘My<sup>azwj</sup> Lord<sup>azwj</sup> Ascended me<sup>saww</sup> (Mi’raj) and He<sup>azwj</sup> Revealed unto me<sup>saww</sup> from behind the Veil what He<sup>azwj</sup> Revealed and Spoke to Me<sup>azwj</sup> Verbally until He<sup>azwj</sup> Said to me<sup>saww</sup>: ‘O Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>! “O Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>! The one who disgraces a friend of Mine<sup>azwj</sup>, so he has declared a war against Me<sup>azwj</sup>, and the one who battles (against) Me<sup>azwj</sup>, I<sup>azwj</sup> Battle against him”.

I said, ‘O Lord<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>! And who is this friend of Yours<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>, for I<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> have known that the one who battles You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup>, You<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> would battle him?’ He<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> Said to me: “That is the one from whom I<sup style="font-weight: normal">azwj</sup> have Taken the Covenant for you<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup>, and for your<sup style="font-weight: normal">saww</sup> successor<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup>, and for both your<sup style="font-weight: normal">asws</sup> children with the Wilayah”’.
en.sarwar: 10. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Yunus from Mu’awiyah from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Messenger of Allah has said, ‘My Lord took me for a journey and revealed to me from behind the curtain whatever He wanted to reveal, and spoke to me vocally and said to me, “O Muhammad, whoever insults any of My friends has waged a war against Me. Whoever fights Me, I fight him.” I then said, ‘O Lord, who is this friend of Yours? I have learned that whoever fights You, You fight him.’ He said to me, ‘This friend is the one with whom I have made a covenant, that he must accept your Divine Authority and Guardianship, the Divine Authority and Guardianship of the executor of your will and the Divine Authority and Guardianship of the descendents of both of you.’”
